text:
Set (OASIS) contains data items developed to measure patient outcomes and for improve home health care. The OASIS assessments are required of all home health agencies certified to accept Medicare and Medicaid payments.

What does this file include? (variable highlights)

HIPPS code

Socio-demographic variables

Information on patient home environment and informal caregivers

Health status, including diagnosis codes

Functional status

Psychosocial status

Health service utilization

Emergent
